extension.summary: LibTV - Your Kodi Library as Real TV
extension.description: Turn your movies and TV shows into linear channels with full TV guide support. Generates an M3U playlist and XMLTV guide for PVR IPTV Simple Client, with plugin-resolved streams so channels play whatever is currently on air.
extension.news:
v0.7.2: add a "Hotkey" setting + "Save hotkey now" button under Guide & playback settings, which writes special://profile/keymaps/libtv.xml for you — no more hand-editing a keymap file to bind a key to the in-playback EPG overlay.
v0.7.1: the video context-menu entry for the EPG overlay did not appear in live testing (root cause unknown) — add a script extension so the overlay is now also directly bindable to any key via a keymap: RunScript(plugin.video.libtv). See README/live-testing docs for the keymap snippet.
v0.7.0: add an in-playback EPG overlay — a "LibTV guide (Now/Next)" entry in the video context menu while a channel is playing shows every channel's current and next programme and lets you jump straight to one, without leaving playback or relying on the skin's own PVR guide behavior.
v0.6.2: renaming, reordering, or deleting a channel in Manage channels now updates the guide instantly instead of re-scanning the whole library — only adding a channel or changing its filters does a full rescan.
